title: The Town Is Quiet
overview: A dark tale of working-class life in Marseilles, a city in crisis. Interesting characters include a hard-bitten but compassionate fish market worker with a drug addicted daughter and a moody bartender with a shocking secret life.

trailers.title: La Ville est tranquille de Robert Guédiguian
